headline: Mosaic Plans to Exit Araxa Assets to Streamline Portfolio
summary: MOS to idle Brazil sites, cut output by 1M tons and book up to $400M charge as it targets cost savings and portfolio optimization.

headline: Is CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (CF) Among the Biggest Agriculture Stocks to Buy in 2026?
summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:CF) is one of the 11 Biggest Agriculture Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 31, 2026, Mizuho analyst Edlain Rodriguez increased CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:CF)’s price objective to $105 from $100 while retaining an Underperform rating. The company announced full-year 2025 earnings of $1.46 billion, or $8.97 per diluted […]
